prompt: The scene opens in a long, narrow corridor with walls made of large, pale panels that are heavily cracked and peeling, revealing darker layers beneath. The floor is concrete, cracked and littered with small debris and patches of green moss. Along the sides, rusted metal barriers stand at intervals, their surfaces corroded and weathered. In the distance, a set of stairs leads upward, illuminated by a few overhead lights that cast a dim, cool glow. The atmosphere is quiet and abandoned, with the only movement being the slow, steady advance of the camera down the corridor, revealing more of the decaying structure and the distant stairs.
